creator: volker@vwsoft.com
text:
Alexander,

> fdisk /dev/da0s1

please don't do that as this gives nothing useful. A slice (DOS
partition) doesn't contain a slice (partition) table.

Please send the output of: `fdisk /dev/da0`

While it still may be a problem of bad media, I would like to check if
your partition table is fine, before blaming the manufacturer of your
memory stick.

Volker
